_comment: Example template. These are NOT real lambdas: replace attack/defense/context with researched data (qualifying xG, FIFA ranking, last match, opponent, context) before treating as a prediction. The structure shows how to build the xG bottom-up.

meta.stakes: What each team is playing for (points, qualification, etc.)
